name: Green Chilies and Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large casserole dish, layer rice, sour cream, green chiles, salt, pepper.
2. Repeat layers 2 more times.
3. Omit Monterey Jack from the top layer.
4. Bake at 350 degrees for 20 to 25 minutes.
5. Sprinkle cheddar cheese on top for the last 5 minutes of baking.
